name: China CPI Headline YoY (All Items)
notes: IMF Data Portal CPI dataset (api.imf.org SDMX 2.1, keyless) — China national all-items CPI year-over-year % change, sourced by the IMF from NBS. Wired 2026-07-08 per forward_plan §2.A A1: the FRED OECD-MEI mirror CHNCPIALLMINMEI froze 2025-04, OECD COICOP2018 has no CHN coverage, and the IMF IFS mirror on DB.nomics lags ~1 year — the IMF's own dataset is monthly-fresh (verified 1.20% @ 2026-05 on the 2026-07-08 vintage; history 1994-01+). Feeds CN_INFL1 headline; wins the cadence-first merge over the World Bank annual CPI_YOY fan-out row.

name: China CPI (All Items)
notes: IMF Data Portal CPI dataset — China national all-items CPI index level (REFERENCE_PERIOD 2020A ⇒ 2020=100; the frozen FRED mirror it replaces was 2015=100, so the base year changes with the repoint). Verified live 2026-07-08 (104.36 @ 2026-05; history 1993-01+). Replaces FRED CHNCPIALLMINMEI (frozen 2025-04, dropped 2026-07-08). CN_INFL1 no longer consumes this (repointed to CHN_CPI_YOY same day, matching the PR #249 pattern); kept for explorer coverage and index-level analytics.
